owasp: A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures (client-side-only validation, server checks nothing)
surface: localhost XBEN-072-24, POST /index.php, password check exists only in client-side JS, server requires only a username POST key to exist

oracle_verdict.note: The admin password (sup3rsecr3t) is checked only in client-side JS, leaked in plaintext page source; the server-side handler never validates it or the username value, only requiring the username POST key to be present, so completely bogus credentials return the flag unconditionally.

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, both found the identical client-side JS leak and independently tried completely bogus credentials, retrieving the byte-identical flag unconditionally.
